description:
The SuSEfirewall2 package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install SuSEfirewall2
rationale: The SuSEfirewall2 package should be installed to provide access control methods.
ocil_clause: the SuSEfirewall2 package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the SuSEfirewall2 package is installed: 
$ rpm -q SuSEfirewall2
title: Install SuSEfirewall2 Package
